description: Deterministic local eval corpus for semantic retrieval regression checks.

documents.text: Use Docker Compose to run web and redis services with restart policies, health checks, and shared network aliases.
Propagate request-scoped context through service layers and stop goroutines early when context cancellation is signaled.
Wrap outbound HTTP calls with context.WithTimeout, classify timeout errors, and allow safe retry logic.
Decode JSON request bodies into typed Go structs with encoding/json and return validation errors for missing required fields.
Configure Kubernetes liveness and readiness probes so unhealthy pods restart quickly and rollout safety is preserved.
Create a PostgreSQL multicolumn btree index on status and created_at to speed up filtered dashboard queries.
Load CSV data with pandas, normalize column names, and fill missing values before downstream analytics jobs.
Use FastAPI with Pydantic models to validate request payloads and return structured 422 responses for invalid input.
Use React useEffect dependency arrays to fetch API results when filter inputs change and avoid stale state updates.
Parse JSON into Rust structs with serde derive annotations and map parse failures into explicit error variants.
Aggregate monthly revenue with SQL date truncation and grouped sums, then order results by month for reporting.
Debounce search input handlers in TypeScript to reduce request volume and prevent excessive API calls while typing.
